creator: giffunip@asme.org
text:
The update of this port only requires the removal of the
patches directory and an update of the pertinent tarball (the older
version disappeared from the net)

How-To-Repeat: I would prefer if this port and the crosssco port were labelled
NO_CDROM= restricted audience, since I don't test this anymore and I
have received reports that the cross libraries are not working.
Of course, a new maintainer would be welcome.
